name: Scarab of Protection
description: This scarab beetle amulet can be worn as a pendant. While wearing it, you have Resistance to all damage except Psychic and Necrotic. When you drop to 0 Hit Points, the scarab shatters, and you drop to 1 Hit Point instead.
properties: Resistance to all damage except Psychic and Necrotic
Auto-save at 1 HP when dropped to 0

name: Scimitar of Speed
description: You gain a +1 bonus to attack rolls and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. While wielding it, you can take an additional Bonus Action on each of your turns.

name: Scroll of Protection
description: This scroll contains a protective ward. When read, the scroll creates a magical barrier that lasts for 1 hour. Various types of protection are available.

name: Scroll of Spell (Level 1)
description: This scroll contains a 1st-level spell. When read, the spell is cast. The spell is cast at its lowest level.

name: Scroll of Spell (Level 2)
description: This scroll contains a 2nd-level spell. When read, the spell is cast. The spell is cast at its lowest level.

name: Scroll of Spell (Level 3)
description: This scroll contains a 3rd-level spell. When read, the spell is cast. The spell is cast at its lowest level.

name: Scroll of Spell (Level 4)
description: This scroll contains a 4th-level spell. When read, the spell is cast. The spell is cast at its lowest level.

name: Scroll of Spell (Level 5)
description: This scroll contains a 5th-level spell. When read, the spell is cast. The spell is cast at its lowest level.

name: Scroll of Spell (Level 6)
description: This scroll contains a 6th-level spell. When read, the spell is cast. The spell is cast at its lowest level.

name: Scroll of Spell (Level 7)
description: This scroll contains a 7th-level spell. When read, the spell is cast. The spell is cast at its lowest level.

name: Scroll of Spell (Level 8)
description: This scroll contains an 8th-level spell. When read, the spell is cast. The spell is cast at its lowest level.

name: Scroll of Spell (Level 9)
description: This scroll contains a 9th-level spell. When read, the spell is cast. The spell is cast at its lowest level.

name: Sending Stones
description: This pair of stones allows two creatures to communicate telepathically across any distance. Each creature has one stone.

name: Sentinel Shield
description: While wielding this shield, you have a +1 bonus to Armor Class. When a creature within 5 feet of you makes an attack roll against a target other than you, you can use your Reaction to impose Disadvantage on the attack roll.
properties: Reaction to impose Disadvantage on attacks vs others

name: Shadowfell Brand Tattoo
description: This tattoo marks you as a servant of the Shadowfell. While you have the tattoo, you have Resistance to Necrotic damage and can cast Minion once per day.

name: Shield of Missile Attraction
description: While wielding this shield, missiles and ranged weapon attacks are drawn to it. The attacker must succeed on a DC 15 Intelligence saving throw or the attack targets the shield instead.
properties: DC 15 Intelligence save or attacked by missiles
Ranged attacks target the shield instead

name: Slippers of Spider Climbing
description: While wearing these slippers, you have a Climbing Speed equal to your Speed. You can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without making ability checks.
properties: Climbing Speed equal to your Speed
Can climb upside down on ceilings

name: Sovereign Glue
description: This bottle contains a powerful adhesive that can bond any two objects together. The bond is as strong as the objects themselves. The glue can also be used to separate bonded objects.

name: Spellguard Shield
description: While wielding this shield, you have a +2 bonus to Armor Class. You have Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.
properties: Advantage on saving throws vs spells and magical effects

name: Sphere of Annihilation
description: This 2-foot-diameter sphere of magical energy is completely black and absorbs all light. Anything that touches the sphere is sucked in and destroyed.

name: Staff of Charming
description: This staff has 10 charges. While holding it, you can cast Charm Person, Charm Monster, or Suggestion. The staff regains 1d6+4 expended charges daily at dawn.
attunement_requirements: Requires Attunement by a Bard, Cleric, Druid, Sorcerer, Warlock, or Wizard

name: Staff of Fire
description: This staff has 10 charges. While holding it, you can cast Burning Hands, Fireball, or Wall of Fire. The staff regains 1d6+4 expended charges daily at dawn.
attunement_requirements: Requires Attunement by a Druid, Sorcerer, Warlock, or Wizard

name: Staff of Frost
description: This staff has 10 charges. While holding it, you can cast Cone of Cold, Fog Cloud, Ice Storm, or Wall of Ice. The staff regains 1d6+4 expended charges daily at dawn.
attunement_requirements: Requires Attunement by a Druid, Sorcerer, Warlock, or Wizard
properties: Cast Cone of Cold/Fog Cloud/Ice Storm/Wall of Ice

name: Staff of Healing
description: This staff has 10 charges. While holding it, you can cast Cure Wounds, Lesser Restoration, or Mass Cure Wounds. The staff regains 1d6+4 expended charges daily at dawn.
attunement_requirements: Requires Attunement by a Bard, Cleric, or Druid
properties: Cast Cure Wounds/Lesser Restoration/Mass Cure Wounds

name: Staff of Power
description: This staff has 20 charges and can be wielded as a magic Quarterstaff that grants a +2 bonus to attack rolls and damage rolls made with it. While holding it, you gain a +2 bonus to spell attack rolls.
attunement_requirements: Requires Attunement by a Sorcerer, Warlock, or Wizard
properties: +2 to attack rolls, damage rolls, spell attacks

name: Staff of Striking
description: This staff has 10 charges. When you hit with a melee attack using it, you can expend up to 3 charges. For each charge you expend, the target takes an extra 1d6 Force damage.

name: Staff of Swarming Insects
description: This staff has 10 charges. While holding it, you can cast Giant Insect or Insect Plague. The staff regains 1d6+4 expended charges daily at dawn.
attunement_requirements: Requires Attunement by a Bard, Cleric, Druid, Sorcerer, Warlock, or Wizard

name: Staff of the Magi
description: This staff has 50 charges and can be wielded as a magic Quarterstaff that grants a +2 bonus to attack rolls and damage rolls made with it.
attunement_requirements: Requires Attunement by a Sorcerer, Warlock, or Wizard
properties: +2 to attack rolls, damage rolls, spell attacks

name: Sword of Life Stealing
description: You gain a +2 bonus to attack rolls and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. When you hit a creature with this weapon, the target takes an extra 1d6 Necrotic damage, and you regain Hit Points equal to the Necrotic damage dealt.
properties: Regain HP equal to Necrotic damage dealt

name: Sword of Sharpness
description: You gain a +3 bonus to attack rolls and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. On a natural 20, the weapon cuts the target in two. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it is sliced into several pieces.
properties: Effective against Large or smaller creatures

name: Sword of Wounding
description: You gain a +1 bonus to attack rolls and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. When you hit a creature with this weapon, the target takes an extra 1d4 Piercing damage. The target can't regain Hit Points until a creature takes a Magic action to remove the wound.
properties: Target can't regain HP until wound removed

name: Talisman of Pure Good
description: This talisman is inscribed with holy symbols. While holding it, you can cast Dispel Evil and Good. The talisman has 3 charges and regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn.

name: Talisman of the Sphere
description: This talisman allows you to communicate telepathically with creatures within 60 feet of you. You can also cast Zone of Silence with it once per day.
properties: Cast Zone of Silence once per day

name: Talisman of Ultimate Evil
description: This talisman is inscribed with unholy symbols. While holding it, you can cast Animate Dead or Bestow Curse. The talisman has 3 charges and regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn.

name: Tome of Clear Thought
description: This book contains instructions for improving the mind. A creature that studies the book for 48 hours gains 2 points in Intelligence, to a maximum of 24. The book is consumed in the process.

name: Tome of Leadership and Influence
description: This book contains instructions for improving the mind. A creature that studies the book for 48 hours gains 2 points in Charisma, to a maximum of 24. The book is consumed in the process.

name: Tome of Understanding
description: This book contains instructions for improving the mind. A creature that studies the book for 48 hours gains 2 points in Wisdom, to a maximum of 24. The book is consumed in the process.

name: Trident of Fish Command
description: You gain a +1 bonus to attack rolls and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. While holding it, you can cast Charm Person or Command on a creature within 30 feet of you.
properties: Cast Charm Person/Command on creature within 30 feet

name: Universal Solvent
description: This bottle contains a powerful solvent that can dissolve any material. The solvent can also be used to create custom containers.

name: Vicious Weapon
description: You gain a +1 bonus to attack rolls and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. When you hit a creature with this weapon, you deal an extra 1d4 damage of the weapon's type.

name: Vorpal Sword
description: You gain a +3 bonus to attack rolls and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. On a natural 20, the weapon cuts the target's head from its body. If the target dies from this effect, its head rolls along the ground for 1d10 minutes before disappearing.
properties: Head rolls for 1d10 minutes before disappearing
